description: Available image styles for The Mahjong Tarot. The Web Designer selects a style name per image request. The Image Designer reads this file to construct Gemini prompts.

styles.name: Celestial & Mystical
styles.visual_direction: Deep cosmos, moonlit skies, glowing zodiac constellations, starfields with Chinese symbols
styles.prompt_hints: deep space atmosphere, soft moonlight, glowing constellation lines, floating Chinese characters, ethereal mist
styles.exclude: Western zodiac symbols, text overlays, watermarks, anime style, rounded or soft shapes, generic stock photography

styles.name: Elemental Drama
styles.visual_direction: Fire, water, earth, metal, wood rendered with cinematic intensity — rich color, dynamic energy
styles.prompt_hints: cinematic depth of field, dramatic top-lighting, dynamic motion, sharp geometric sparks, intense color saturation
styles.exclude: Western zodiac symbols, text overlays, watermarks, anime style, rounded or soft shapes, generic stock photography

styles.name: Zodiac Portraiture
styles.visual_direction: The 12 animals rendered with beauty, character, and symbolic power
styles.prompt_hints: dignified animal portrait, symbolic accessories, rich textural detail, strong focal point centered or slightly right-of-center
styles.exclude: Western zodiac symbols, text overlays, watermarks, anime style, rounded or soft shapes, generic stock photography

styles.name: Sacred & Symbolic
styles.visual_direction: Mahjong tiles, lotus flowers, lanterns, yin-yang, red thread of fate, Chinese brush art
styles.prompt_hints: flat-lay or close-up arrangement, ink wash texture, warm candlelight or lantern glow, reverent and still composition
styles.exclude: Western zodiac symbols, text overlays, watermarks, anime style, rounded or soft shapes, generic stock photography

styles.name: Seasonal & Nature
styles.visual_direction: Cherry blossom, autumn gold, winter snow, summer storms — tied to the Chinese calendar
styles.prompt_hints: wide landscape or macro nature, soft natural light, seasonal color palette, sense of stillness or movement depending on season
styles.exclude: Western zodiac symbols, text overlays, watermarks, anime style, rounded or soft shapes, generic stock photography
